home.prompt_label: What would you like to learn?
home.prompt_placeholder: e.g. I want to learn about photosynthesis at 5th grade level
home.enter_hint: Press Enter to begin, or Shift+Enter for a new line.
home.hero_title: What do you want to learn today?
home.hero_subtitle: Type anything — a lesson with pictures or a playful quiz, made just for you.
home.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
home.refuse_try: How about one of these instead?
home.have_code: Have a resume code? Continue learning
home.continue_title: Pick up where you left off
example_list: Learn about the water cycle for 3rd grade
Quiz me on the French Revolution, high school
Test me on Spanish food vocabulary

loading.error_body: We hit a snag while building this. Let's try again.
loading.cheer_1: Great choice — this is going to be fun!
loading.cheer_2: Adding pictures and examples just for you…
loading.cheer_3: Mixing in a little practice to help it stick…
loading.cheer_4: Almost there — making it just right!

results.title: Nice work!
results.subpar: Want another go? These cover similar ground.

stats.title: My progress
stats.no_profile: Start learning and your progress will show up here.

review.empty_body: Take this quiz and you'll be able to review your answers here.

resume.title: Continue learning
resume.label: Enter your resume code
resume.save_hint: Save this code to continue on any device. We don't ask for any personal details.
resume.not_found: We couldn't find that code. Please check it and try again.
resume.share_text: Continue learning on SchoolAutomaton — tap to pick up where we left off.
resume.created_toast: Progress saved! Your code to continue is {code} — keep it safe (find it under ⚙ Settings).
resume.copy_failed: Couldn't copy — long-press or select the code to copy it.

gamification.badges_empty_desc: Keep learning — your first badge is on its way!

tree.empty_desc: Start learning and your knowledge garden will grow here.
tree.locked_hint: Master the earlier topics to unlock this.
tree.water_hint: Time to water this — a quick review will keep it strong.

footer.ai_disclosure: Lessons & quizzes are AI-generated — double-check anything important.

crisis.title: You matter. Help is available.
crisis.disclaimer: I'm an AI assistant, not a mental-health professional.
crisis.default_message: It sounds like you're going through something really hard. You're not alone, and people are ready to help right now.

a11y.language_hint: Sets the language and education system new lessons & quizzes follow.
a11y.synced_hint: Your preferences are saved and follow your resume code.

lesson.gated_hint: Finish the section above to unlock this one.
lesson.review_body: We'll bring the trickiest ideas back for a quick review at just the right time, so they stick for good.
lesson.closing: You showed up and gave it a go — that's how learning grows. Proud of you!
lesson.load_error_body: Something went wrong fetching your lesson. Let's head back and try again.
lesson.next_error: Couldn't prepare the next part. Please try again.

admin.title: Admin console
admin.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
admin.load_error: Could not load data. Please try again.

audit.title: Sanitization audit
audit.topic_hashed_note: Topics are stored hashed for privacy — only a one-way hash is shown, never the student's words.
audit.empty_desc: No requests match these filters yet.

settings.title: App settings
settings.desc: Runtime configuration. Secret values (API keys) are write-only and shown masked.
settings.invalid_json: Enter a valid JSON value (true, false, a number, or "quoted text").
settings.save_error: Could not save. You may not have permission to edit settings.
settings.empty_desc: Add a setting to configure runtime behavior.

content.title: Content library
content.desc: Cached lessons and quizzes. Filter by subject and grade band.
content.empty_desc: Generated lessons and quizzes will appear here.

test.grade_error: We couldn't check that answer. Please try again.
test.load_error_body: Something went wrong fetching your quiz. Let's head back and try again.

match.instructions: Drag each answer onto its match, or tap an answer then tap where it goes.

order.instructions: Put these in the correct order. Drag, or use the up and down buttons.
order.reorder: {item}, position {pos}. Use arrow up or down to move it.

hotspot.instructions: Tap the correct spot on the picture.
hotspot.image_unavailable: Picture unavailable — pick the labelled option.

history.title: My lessons
history.no_profile: You haven't started any lessons yet.
history.empty: Your lessons will appear here once you create one.
history.load_error: Couldn't load your lessons. Please try again.
